CREATE TABLE test_ascii (id Int32, str String);
SELECT id, ascii(str) FROM test_ascii WHERE str IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, ascii('Hello World') AS ascii_value;
SELECT id, ascii(SUBSTRING(str, 1, 1)) FROM test_ascii WHERE LENGTH(str) > 0;
WITH (SELECT MIN(id) AS min_id FROM test_ascii) AS tmp SELECT ascii(str) FROM test_ascii WHERE id = (SELECT min_id);
CREATE TABLE test_ascii_nested AS SELECT id, ascii(str) AS ascii_code FROM test_ascii;
SELECT ascii(str) AS first_char_ascii FROM (SELECT str FROM test_ascii WHERE id = 2) AS subquery;
SELECT id, ascii(CONCAT(str, '')) AS ascii_with_empty_concat FROM test_ascii;
SELECT id, ascii(str) FROM test_ascii WHERE ascii(str) BETWEEN 65 AND 90;
SELECT id, ascii(str) FROM test_ascii WHERE str NOT LIKE '%[^ -~]%';
SELECT str, ascii(str) AS ascii_value FROM test_ascii WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_ascii);
